rules.label: Time Validated

failMsgs.msg: {{(function(){var s=F('Actual Start');var f=F('Actual Finish');var d=hours(F('Duration'));var ms=[];if(!s)ms.push('Actual Start missing');if(!f)ms.push('Actual Finish missing');if(!d)ms.push('Duration missing or zero');var a=hoursBetween(s,f);if(d&&d>0&&a!=null&&d>a)ms.push('Duration ('+d.toFixed(2)+' hrs) exceeds elapsed ('+a.toFixed(2)+' hrs)');return ms.join(' | ');})()}}

rules.passMsg: {{(function(){var d=hours(F('Duration'));var a=hoursBetween(F('Actual Start'),F('Actual Finish'));return (d!=null&&a!=null)?d.toFixed(2)+' hrs duration / '+a.toFixed(2)+' hrs elapsed':'';})()}}
rules.shortFailMsg: {{!(F('Work Order :: Actual Start'))&&!(F('Work Order :: Actual Finish'))&&(hours(F('Work Order :: Duration'))==null||hours(F('Work Order :: Duration'))===0)?'Missing: Start, Finish, Duration':!(F('Work Order :: Actual Start'))&&(hours(F('Work Order :: Duration'))==null||hours(F('Work Order :: Duration'))===0)?'Missing: Start, Duration':!(F('Work Order :: Actual Finish'))&&(hours(F('Work Order :: Duration'))==null||hours(F('Work Order :: Duration'))===0)?'Missing: Finish, Duration':!(F('Work Order :: Actual Start'))&&!(F('Work Order :: Actual Finish'))?'Missing: Start, Finish':!(F('Work Order :: Actual Start'))?'Missing: Actual Start':!(F('Work Order :: Actual Finish'))?'Missing: Actual Finish':(hours(F('Work Order :: Duration'))==null||hours(F('Work Order :: Duration'))===0)?'Missing: Duration':hours(F('Work Order :: Duration'))!=null&&hoursBetween(F('Work Order :: Actual Start'),F('Work Order :: Actual Finish'))!=null&&hours(F('Work Order :: Duration'))>hoursBetween(F('Work Order :: Actual Start'),F('Work Order :: Actual Finish'))?'Duration > Elapsed':'Check times'}}

rules.label: Downtime Logged
rules.passMsg: {{(function(){var wt=F('Work Type');var types=['DM','DMPDM','DMPM','FDM','RBLD','SAFDM','TRBL','SDDM'];if(!oneOf(wt,types))return 'Not req.';if(!notEmpty(F('Asset')))return '✓ No asset - skipped';return '✓ Downtime confirmed: '+col('m69f3c12d','Downtime').reduce(function(s,v){var h=hours(v);return s+(h||0);},0).toFixed(2)+' hrs';})()}}
rules.shortPassMsg: {{(function(){var wt=F('Work Type');var types=['DM','DMPDM','DMPM','FDM','RBLD','SAFDM','TRBL','SDDM'];if(!oneOf(wt,types))return '✓ Not req.';if(!notEmpty(F('Asset')))return '✓ No asset';return '✓ Downtime: '+col('m69f3c12d','Downtime').reduce(function(s,v){var h=hours(v);return s+(h||0);},0).toFixed(2);})()}}

failMsgs.msg: Duration'));var total=col('Labor','Regular Hours').reduce(function(s,v){var h=hours(v);return s+(h||0);},0);dur!=null&&total>dur :: Total labor hours ({{col('Labor','Regular Hours').reduce(function(s,v){var h=hours(v);return s+(h||0);},0).toFixed(2)}} hrs) exceed WO duration ({{hours(F('Work Order :: Duration'))!=null?hours(F('Work Order :: Duration')).toFixed(2)+'hrs':'unknown'}}).

rules.shortWarnMsg: {{(function(){   var hasKw = /\b(tt|training)\b/.test((F('Work Order :: Description') || '').toLowerCase());   if (!hasKw) return '';   var types = col('Labor', 'Labor Type');   if (!types.length) return 'labor types not collected — re-scan';   var tc = types.filter(function(v) { return (v || '').toUpperCase() === 'TRAINING'; }).length;   if (tc === 0) return 'no labor type TRAINING';   if (tc < types.length) return tc + ' of ' + types.length + ' labor rows are TRAINING';   return ''; })()}}

warnMsgs.msg: {{(function(){var types=col('Labor','Labor Type');if(!types.length)return 'Labor types not collected — re-scan Actuals tab';var tc=types.filter(function(v){return(v||'').toUpperCase()==='TRAINING';}).length;var counts={};types.forEach(function(v){var k=(v||'(blank)').toUpperCase();counts[k]=(counts[k]||0)+1;});var summary=Object.keys(counts).map(function(k){return k+' ('+counts[k]+')';}).join(', ');if(tc===0)return 'No TRAINING labor type. Types: '+summary;return tc+' of '+types.length+' rows are TRAINING. Types: '+summary;})()}}

rules.label: Production Approver

failMsgs.msg: {{(function(){var g1=(F('Approval Group 1')||'').trim();var g2=(F('Approval Group 2')||'').trim();var g3=(F('Approval Group 3')||'').trim();if(!g1&&!g2&&!g3)return 'No Approval Group assigned.';var g=g1||g2||g3;var known=['AVWP-PRD-B1','AVWP-PRD-B1-C1','AVWP-PRD-B-PACK'];if(known.indexOf(g)===-1)return 'Unrecognized approval group: '+g;return 'Check approval group.';})()}}

rules.passMsg: {{(function(){var lot=(F('Production Run Lot #')||'').trim();if(lot.length<4)return 'No Lot # - Skipped';var g=[(F('Approvers :: Approval Group 1')||'').trim(),(F('Approvers :: Approval Group 2')||'').trim(),(F('Approvers :: Approval Group 3')||'').trim()].find(function(v){return v.length>0;})||'';if(g==='AVWP-PRD-B1')return 'C2/3 Production Group';if(g==='AVWP-PRD-B1-C1')return 'C1 Production Group';if(g==='AVWP-PRD-B-PACK')return 'Biologics Packaging Group';return g;})()}}
rules.shortPassMsg: {{(function(){var lot=(F('Production Run Lot #')||'').trim();if(lot.length<4)return '✓ Skipped';var g=[(F('Approval Group 1')||'').trim(),(F('Approval Group 2')||'').trim(),(F('Approval Group 3')||'').trim()].find(function(v){return v.length>0;})||'';if(g==='AVWP-PRD-B1')return '✓ C2/3 Prod.';if(g==='AVWP-PRD-B1-C1')return '✓ C1 Prod.';if(g==='AVWP-PRD-B-PACK')return '✓ B1 Pack';return '✓ '+g;})()}}
rules.shortFailMsg: {{(function(){var g1=(F('Approvers :: Approval Group 1')||'').trim();var g2=(F('Approvers :: Approval Group 2')||'').trim();var g3=(F('Approvers :: Approval Group 3')||'').trim();if(!g1&&!g2&&!g3)return 'No Approver';var g=g1||g2||g3;var known=['AVWP-PRD-B1','AVWP-PRD-B1-C1','AVWP-PRD-B-PACK'];return known.indexOf(g)===-1?'Unknown Group':'Check Group';})()}}

rules.label: Descriptions

failMsgs.msg: {{(function(){var ms=[];if(!(F('Description')||'').trim())ms.push('Description');if(!(F('Reason for Maintenance')||'').trim())ms.push('Reason for Maintenance');if(!(F('As Found Condition')||'').trim())ms.push('As Found Condition');if(!(F('Work Performed')||'').trim())ms.push('Work Performed');return ms.length?'Missing: '+ms.join(', '):'Check text fields';})()}}

rules.shortFailMsg: {{(function(){var ms=[];if(!(F('Description')||'').trim())ms.push('Desc');if(!(F('Reason for Maintenance')||'').trim())ms.push('Reason');if(!(F('As Found Condition')||'').trim())ms.push('As Found');if(!(F('Work Performed')||'').trim())ms.push('Work Done');return ms.length?'Missing: '+ms.join(', '):'';})()}}

warnMsgs.condition: ((F('As Found Condition')||'').trim().length>0&&(F('As Found Condition')||'').trim().length<30&&(F('As Found Condition')||'').trim().toLowerCase()!=='n/a'&&(F('As Found Condition')||'').trim().toLowerCase()!=='na')||((F('Work Performed')||'').trim().length>0&&(F('Work Performed')||'').trim().length<30&&(F('Work Performed')||'').trim().toLowerCase()!=='n/a'&&(F('Work Performed')||'').trim().toLowerCase()!=='na')||((F('Reason for Maintenance')||'').trim().length>0&&(F('Reason for Maintenance')||'').trim().length<30&&(F('Reason for Maintenance')||'').trim().toLowerCase()!=='n/a'&&(F('Reason for Maintenance')||'').trim().toLowerCase()!=='na')
warnMsgs.msg: One or more fields are under 30 characters — check As Found Condition, Work Performed, and Reason for Maintenance

warnMsgs.condition: ((function(){var vals=[(F('Description')||'').trim(),(F('Reason for Maintenance')||'').trim(),(F('As Found Condition')||'').trim(),(F('Work Performed')||'').trim()].filter(function(v){return v.length>0;});var seen={};return vals.some(function(v){if(seen[v.toLowerCase()])return true;seen[v.toLowerCase()]=1;return false;});})())
warnMsgs.msg: Two or more fields have identical content — check Description, Reason for Maintenance, As Found Condition, and Work Performed

rules.shortWarnMsg: {{(function(){var p=/^(n\/?a|not\s+applicable|none|n\.a\.?)$/i;var vals=[(F('Work Order :: Description')||'').trim(),(F('Work Order :: Reason for Maintenance')||'').trim(),(F('Work Order :: As Found Condition')||'').trim(),(F('Work Order :: Work Performed')||'').trim()];var hasNA=vals.some(function(v){return p.test(v);});var hasShort=vals.some(function(v){return v&&!p.test(v)&&v.length<30;});var seen={};var hasDup=vals.filter(function(v){return v.length>0;}).some(function(v){var k=v.toLowerCase();if(seen[k])return true;seen[k]=1;return false;});if(hasNA&&hasShort&&hasDup)return '⚠ N/A + short + duplicate fields';if(hasNA&&hasDup)return '⚠ N/A + duplicate fields';if(hasShort&&hasDup)return '⚠ short + duplicate fields';if(hasNA&&hasShort)return '⚠ N/A + short fields';if(hasDup)return '⚠ duplicate fields';if(hasNA)return '⚠ N/A in fields';if(hasShort)return '⚠ short fields (<30 chars)';return '';})()}}

rules.label: Required WO Fields

failMsgs.msg: {{(function(){var ms=[];if(!(F('Work Type')||'').trim())ms.push('Work Type');if(!(F('Priority')||'').trim())ms.push('Priority');if(!(F('Work Group')||'').trim())ms.push('Work Group');if(!(F('Lead')||'').trim())ms.push('Lead');if(!(F('Owner')||'').trim())ms.push('Owner');return ms.length?'Missing: '+ms.join(', '):'Check required fields';})()}}

vars.label: Core

r_duration.custom: {{!(F('Work Order :: Actual Start'))&&!(F('Work Order :: Actual Finish'))&&(hours(F('Work Order :: Duration'))==null||hours(F('Work Order :: Duration'))===0)?'missing actual start/finish and duration':!(F('Work Order :: Actual Start'))&&(hours(F('Work Order :: Duration'))==null||hours(F('Work Order :: Duration'))===0)?'missing actual start and duration':!(F('Work Order :: Actual Finish'))&&(hours(F('Work Order :: Duration'))==null||hours(F('Work Order :: Duration'))===0)?'missing actual finish and duration':!(F('Work Order :: Actual Start'))&&!(F('Work Order :: Actual Finish'))?'missing actual start/finish':!(F('Work Order :: Actual Start'))?'missing actual start':!(F('Work Order :: Actual Finish'))?'missing actual finish':(hours(F('Work Order :: Duration'))==null||hours(F('Work Order :: Duration'))===0)?'missing duration':hours(F('Work Order :: Duration'))!=null&&hoursBetween(F('Work Order :: Actual Start'),F('Work Order :: Actual Finish'))!=null&&hours(F('Work Order :: Duration'))>hoursBetween(F('Work Order :: Actual Start'),F('Work Order :: Actual Finish'))?'duration bigger than time between actual start/finish':'Check times'}}

r_1783432272115.custom: {{rowCount('Labor')===0?'no labor logged in actuals':col('Labor','Regular Hours').reduce(function(s,v){var h=hours(v);return s+(h!=null?h:0);},0)>(hours(F('Work Order :: Duration'))||0)?'labor hours exceed WO duration':'Check labor'}}

r_1783525682564.custom: {{(function(){var ms=[];if(!(F('Description')||'').trim())ms.push('description');if(!(F('Reason for Maintenance')||'').trim())ms.push('reason for maintenance');if(!(F('As Found Condition')||'').trim())ms.push('as found condition');if(!(F('Work Performed')||'').trim())ms.push('work performed');return ms.length?'missing '+ms.join(', '):'';})()}}
